# Evals

The review-eval harness (case / harness / match / judge / patch / stats and its own CLI).

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos_loom.evals` | XS | 0 | 0 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review` | XS | 0 | 0 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.case` | S | 2 | 1 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.cli` | S | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.harness` | S | 1 | 2 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.judge` | S | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.match` | S | 2 | 3 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.patch` | S | 0 | 1 |
| `lithos_loom.evals.review.stats` | XS | 0 | 1 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.case`
- class `Expected` ‚Äî A defect a correct review MUST surface.
- class `Case` ‚Äî One seeded-defect benchmark case.
- def `load_case` ‚Äî Load and validate the case in *case_dir* (``case.toml`` + the AC file).

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.cli`
- def `review` ‚Äî Measure the panel's catch-rate on the seeded-defect benchmark.

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.harness`
- class `CaseResult` ‚Äî Aggregated metrics for one case over K runs.
- def `run_case` ‚Äî Run *case* *k* times and aggregate the catch / severity / FP rates.
- def `live_review` ‚Äî Run review-only mode against *head_sha* and return its report JSON.

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.judge`
- def `build_agent_judge` ‚Äî A :data:`~.match.Judge` backed by a host-direct agent call.

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.match`
- class `MatchResult` ‚Äî Whether one expected defect was surfaced, and how.
- class `RunScore` ‚Äî Score for one review run against a case (all expecteds must match).
- def `match_expected` ‚Äî Match one *expected* defect against the *produced* findings.
- def `review_incomplete` ‚Äî Whether any reviewer's turn did not produce a verdict (#182 A3).
- def `score_run` ‚Äî Score one review run: the case is caught iff EVERY expected matches.

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.patch`
- def `materialise_patch_heads` ‚Äî Resolve a case's patch-defined head(s) to ephemeral-commit shas (#193).

### `lithos_loom.evals.review.stats`
- def `wilson_interval` ‚Äî 95% Wilson score interval ``(lo, hi)`` in ``[0, 1]`` for ``successes`` / ``n``.
